tos-short.message: By clicking the button below, you agree to our Terms of Use.

block-youtube-ads-description.message: Watch your favorite videos without interruptions. Adblock Plus now blocks video ads on YouTube, so you can enjoy uninterrupted content.

block-youtube-ads-item-1.message: No pre-roll, mid-roll, or post-roll ads

block-youtube-ads-image-alt.message: Adblock Plus blocking ads on YouTube
